series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to ORC 4765.02 the State Board of Emergency Medical Services must meet a minimum of four times per year to conduct business as related to duties required in ORC 4765.11. Records are comprised of the minutes of these meetings that reflect the actions taken by the board, rule promulgation, policy and procedure approvals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy for 10 years then have State Archives review prior to disposal to determine if the records should be transferred to State Archives or destroyed. ; Electronic: Copies of minutes are posted on Division of EMS web page for 2 years, then deleted. Audio cassette recordings of meetings are retained six months from date of recording, then erased., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Erase
